full_text:
Ren Kui 任夔
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ren Kui (任夔). Advised attacking Cao Hong early but the plan resulted in Kui’s death. Ren Kui was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Ren Kui lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
